name: Audio Capture
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Pawel Mazur
SIGMA Title: Audio Capture
SIGMA Description: Detects attempts to record audio with arecord utility

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%arecord%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-vv%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%-fdat%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Audio Capture on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%arecord%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-vv%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%-fdat%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
